reviewTitle.description: Title of the review in a list.

reviewText.description: Text of the review in a list.

otherAuthors.message: {number, plural, one {# other author} other {# other authors}}
otherAuthors.description: Text for the entry in the author list indicating the number of anonymous authors.

reviewPublished.description: Label for the date that the review was published.

repository.description: Label for the repository containing the dataset.
